---
name: "Report wrong product or vendor match"
about: "An advisory was matched to the wrong product or vendor"
labels: ["data-quality", "product-match"]
assignees: ''
---

## Wrong Product / Vendor Match Report

**issue_id:**
<!-- The issue ID that has the incorrect product or vendor. Find this in the feed or dashboard. -->


**actual_product:**
<!-- What the issue currently shows for the product name -->


**expected_product:**
<!-- What the product name should be -->


**actual_vendor:**
<!-- What the issue currently shows for the vendor name -->


**expected_vendor:**
<!-- What the vendor name should be -->


**source_reference:**
<!--
A link or source_id that confirms the correct product/vendor.
Examples:
  - https://www.cisa.gov/icsma-advisory-link
  - source_id: philips-psirt
  - Vendor advisory URL showing the official product name
Note: vendor naming is inconsistent across sources — a source reference is especially helpful here.
-->


**additional_context:**
<!-- Optional: any other context that would help identify the correct match -->


---

- [ ] I have searched existing issues to avoid duplicates
